description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MacOS/iOS/tvOS build that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow consists of two jobs: prechecks and build. The prechecks job runs on macos-14, clones DiligentCore and DiligentTools repositories, and performs format validation. The build job depends on prechecks, runs on macos-14 with a matrix strategy for MacOS, iOS, and tvOS platforms and Debug and Release build types, and performs various build and test steps.
